potential_missing.source_sentence: a job site serves a dual purpose.
it lists out the availability of jobs to candidates, and on the other, it serves as a database of registered candidate’s profiles for companies to shortlist.
As it is important to keep the candidates engaged during their job search, it is important to provide facets on the abovementioned criteria so that they can narrow down to the jobs of their choice .

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall list out job availability irrespective of field.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall serve as a database of registered candidate’s profiles for companies to shortlist.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall maintain a database of registered candidates' profiles for easy access by companies.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: As it is important to keep the candidates engaged during their job search, it is important to provide facets on the abovementioned criteria so that they can narrow down to the jobs of their choice (Figures 22.1–22.8).
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall provide interactive facets for easy candidate engagement and job filtering.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall predict job availability based on location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not explicitly mentioned in the source text. The original text only mentions predicting job availability, but does not specify the criteria.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall list out job availability irrespective of field.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall provide facets on criteria such as location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar in scope. The first requirement is a subset of the second one.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall predict job availability based on location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement may be ambiguous due to the use of 'predict'. Does it mean predicting future job availability or providing real-time job listings?
